column1: Do you enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all production admin accounts?
What is your target recovery time objective (RTO) for critical services?
How frequently are external vulnerability scans performed?
How long are application and infrastructure logs retained?
Do you encrypt customer data at rest and in transit? Please include protocols/standards.
What is your incident response notification timeline for customers after confirming a security incident?
Do you conduct employee security awareness training and how often?
Where is customer data hosted and can customers request data residency?
Do you support role-based access control and least-privilege access for internal operations?
Do you maintain SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications?
Describe your backup policy and disaster recovery testing cadence.
Do you provide a dedicated subprocessor change notification workflow?
